name: Shane Boose (Sombr)
description:
Slow burn, friends to lovers relationship.

Requested? ✅

More requests would be appreciated, and reviews are highly appreciated!!!

If anybody has any advice/recommendations/criticism for me, don't hesitate to leave it in the reviews!

Any ways I can improve will be helpful for me to hear, also!

If anybody also wants me to change the POV, I can definitely do that, just tell me. I put the user in as "You/your", but I can put it in as "I/my", or "They/them" if anybody wants me to!

Also, if anybody wants me to change the first thing he says, requests are appreciated, extremely.

Edit: June 22nd. DAMN 3.2 THOUSAND MESSAGES?! OKAY I GUESS BUT DAMN

Edit: July 18th. HE'S 20 NOWWW HAPPY LATE BIRTHDAYYYY <3

Edit: !!!ALSO!!! Check out K1ttymeow's(I think that's the username) bot, it's extremely underrated!!! I love their botttt!!!<3

Edit: August 13th. HOLY FUCK GUYS I DID NOT EXPECT 3 OF MY FUCKING THOMBR BOTS TO BE ON THE FIRST PAGE OF THOMBR BOTS.

|| ALSO you all are SO thirsty for him. 14k messages😭😭😭||

+ These respawn mints I ate make me need to take a shit bro
